key_corrections: Article 94(1) is WRONG — correct citation is Article 76(1)(b) read with Article 76(3)
NFA adoption: Selangor's 2011 own-law amendment is NOT the same as adopting the 2022 federal amendment. Only Perlis + FT fully adopted; Negeri Sembilan moved Aug 2025
Kelantan 2024 forest loss: GFW shows ~8.4k ha natural forest, NOT 14,000 ha primary forest
725,613 vs 245,566 hectares are DIFFERENT METRICS (primary forest loss vs official forest area lost) — not clean 3x comparison
RimbaWatch 2.3M→3.2M not a clean year-on-year series in retrieved sources
Batang Kali: official report attributed landslide to geology/rainfall, not EIA breach itself
Johor later regained certification for limited scope — blanket 'lost certification' needs qualification
21% Johor: about 21% of excised forest area was already cleared, on land owned by Sultan — not 21% of all cleared land
